message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
participant "halon" as halon #DDE6F4
box "" #LightGray
  participant ios1 #DDE6F4
  participant ios2 #DDE6F4
end box
participant client #DDE6F4

frame SNS_operation_start {
    note over halon : notification [(pool, repair), (disk, repair)]
    
    loop until all ios are ready 
        halon ->> ios2:repair status request\n
        activate ios2
        return repair status reply \n deactivate ios2
        
    end
    
   halon->ios2:spiel_repair_start  
}


note right of halon:#white;repair process 

alt sucessful case 
    
     group notify[(pool,repaired),(disk,repaired)]:SNS_status_query
     
         alt unil_all_ios_are_in_IDLE
            
             opt idle_loop
                
                 par parallel_execution
                    
                     halt-->halt:idle_check_request_0x3789A5B2C1EFD4GHIJKLmnopqrstuvwxYZabcdeFGHijklmNOPQRSTuvwxyZABCD_EfghIjklMnopqRstUVwxyzABCDefgHiJkLMnoPQRStuVWXYzabCdEfGHijKlmNOpQrSTUvWXyzaBCdEFghiJKLMNoPqrstuVWXYZabcd_ef_Gh_Ijk_Lmn_Opq_Rs_T_u_v_w_x_y_z_ABC_DE_FG_HI_J_K_L_M_N_OP_QRS_t_U_V_W_X_Y_Z_a_b_c_d_e_f_g_h_i_j_k_l_m_n_o_p_q_r_s_t_uv_w_xyz_AB_CD_Efg_Hi_JKL_MNO_PQRS_TUV_WXYZ_abcd_E_fg_hi_jklMNOPQRSTUVWXYZabcdefGhiJKLMNOPQRSTUVW_xyZA_B_C_D__efghijk_lm_no_pqrstuvwxyzABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZabcdefgh_ij_klm_NOP_QrstuvwxyzABCDE___FGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZabcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyzABCDEFGHI____JKLM_____NOP__________QRSTUVWXYZ____________________________a________________________________b________________________________________________________________c_________defghijklmnopqrstuvwxyzABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXY\ZZYXWVUTSRQPONMLKJIHGFE_DCBAzyxwvu_ts_rqponmlkjihgfedcbaZYXWV_UTSrqpoNMlkjihGFEDCBazyxwwvvutsrrqqppoonnmllkkjjiihhggffeeddccbbbaaaAAAbbbbccccdddddddddEEEEEEEEEffffffffffffffGGGGGGGGGGHHHHHHIIIIIJJJJKKLLLMMMNNOOO
